mapper.sql: Id, Enterprise_No, Signature_Content, Signature_Type, Approve_Status, Approve_User_Id, Approve_Date, Approve_Remark, Status_Code, Create_Date
mapper.insert:
insert into sms_signature (Id, Enterprise_No, Signature_Content, Signature_Type, Approve_Status, Approve_User_Id, Approve_Date, Approve_Remark, Status_Code, Create_Date ) values (#{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{signature_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{signature_Type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approve_Status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{approve_User_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{approve_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{approve_Remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} )
SELECT LAST_INSERT_ID() AS Id

insert into sms_signature (Id, Enterprise_No, Signature_Content, Signature_Type, Approve_Status, Approve_User_Id, Approve_Date, Approve_Remark, Status_Code, Create_Date) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.signature_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.signature_Type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.approve_Status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.approve_User_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{item.approve_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.approve_Remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.status_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})

Id,
Enterprise_No,
Signature_Content,
Signature_Type,
Approve_Status,
Approve_User_Id,
Approve_Date,

mapper.update:
update sms_signature
Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Enterprise_No = #{record.enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Signature_Content = #{record.signature_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Signature_Type = #{record.signature_Type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Approve_Status = #{record.approve_Status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Approve_User_Id = #{record.approve_User_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Approve_Date = #{record.approve_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Approve_Remark = #{record.approve_Remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Status_Code = #{record.status_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Create_Date = #{record.create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},

update sms_signature set Id = #{record.id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Enterprise_No = #{record.enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Signature_Content = #{record.signature_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Signature_Type = #{record.signature_Type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Approve_Status = #{record.approve_Status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Approve_User_Id = #{record.approve_User_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Approve_Date = #{record.approve_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Approve_Remark = #{record.approve_Remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Status_Code = #{record.status_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Create_Date = #{record.create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}

update sms_signature
Enterprise_No = #{enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Signature_Content = #{signature_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Signature_Type = #{signature_Type,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Approve_Status = #{approve_Status,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Approve_User_Id = #{approve_User_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER},
Approve_Date = #{approve_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
Approve_Remark = #{approve_Remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Status_Code = #{status_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
Create_Date = #{create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}

update sms_signature set Enterprise_No = #{enterprise_No,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Signature_Content = #{signature_Content,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Signature_Type = #{signature_Type,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Approve_Status = #{approve_Status,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Approve_User_Id = #{approve_User_Id,jdbcType=INTEGER}, Approve_Date = #{approve_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, Approve_Remark = #{approve_Remark,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Status_Code = #{status_Code,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, Create_Date = #{create_Date,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where Id = #{id,jdbcType=INTEGER}
